MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TERRENCE P. MURPHY, Esq. of Law Offices of Terrence P. Murphy (Tel: 415-495-3950) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Rafael Ruiz;
Atty. IAN WILSON, Esq. of Tyson & Mendes LLP (Tel: 628-253-5070) for defendants Wedgewood LLC and Catamount Properties 2018 LLC.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF RAFAEL RUIZ.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

At movant's request, the Court instructs Mr. Murphy to call the Court's chambers number at 10:10 a.m. to conduct an in camera hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the Court conducts an in camera hearing with Mr. Murphy, the Court signs an order granting movant's motion to be releived as counsel for plaintiff Rafael Ruiz. (302/RBU) *****
